heading: Financial assistance
label: 1131c–1 Financial assistance
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 627, and is classified to .section 626 of Pub. L. 89–329section 1131d of this titleAnother prior was renumbered section 628, and is classified to .section 626 of Pub. L. 89–329section 1131e of this title

children.heading: Authority
children.label: a Authority
children.text: The Institute may provide financial assistance, in the form of summer stipends described in subsection (b) and Ralph Bunche scholarship assistance described in subsection (c), to low-income students to facilitate the participation of the students in the Institute’s programs under this part.

children.heading: Requirements
children.label: 1 Requirements
children.text: A student receiving a summer stipend under this section shall use such stipend to defray the student’s cost of participation in a summer institute program funded under this part, including the costs of travel, living, and educational expenses necessary for the student’s participation in such program.

children.heading: Amount
children.label: 2 Amount
children.text: A summer stipend awarded to a student under this section shall not exceed $3,000 per summer.

children.label: A
children.text: shall be a full-time student at an institution of higher education who is accepted into a program funded under this part; and

children.label: B
children.text: shall use such scholarship to pay costs related to the cost of attendance, as defined in section 1087 of this title, at the institution of higher education in which the student is enrolled.ll

children.heading: Amount and duration
children.label: 2 Amount and duration
children.text: A Ralph Bunche scholarship awarded to a student under this section shall not exceed $5,000 per academic year.
